Battery Doorstep Delivery — Gajwel, Siddipet, Medak & Villages

Same-day battery delivery within 50 km of Gajwel. Car, bike & inverter batteries delivered and installed at your doorstep. Free delivery within 20 km.

📞 Call 9397617823 💬 WhatsApp Order

How Our Battery Delivery Works

1

Call or WhatsApp

Contact us at 9397617823. Tell us your vehicle type, your location, and what battery you need.

2

Instant Quote

We give you an exact price on the call — model, warranty, and any delivery charges discussed upfront.

3

Fast Dispatch

Our delivery technician is dispatched with the right battery, tools, and old-battery exchange facilities.

4

Installed at Your Door

Battery fitted in 15–30 minutes. We test the voltage and charging system before leaving.

Delivery Coverage Area

We currently deliver batteries to all areas listed below. If your location is not listed, call us — we may still be able to reach you.

0–10 km Zone

⏱ Delivery: 20–30 min 📍 Gajwel town, Kothaguda, Raikal, Velmal 💰 Charge: Free

10–20 km Zone

⏱ Delivery: 30–50 min 📍 Markook, Jagdevpur, Regode, Turkapally, Wargal 💰 Charge: Free

20–35 km Zone

⏱ Delivery: 50–90 min 📍 Dubbak, Sangem, Kondapak, Chinnakodur, Siddipet 💰 Charge: Minimal

35–50+ km Zone

⏱ Delivery: 1.5–2 hrs 📍 Toopran, Komuravelli, Narsapur, Papannapet, Chegunta 💰 Charge: Discussed upfront

All Delivery Locations

🔋 Gajwel → 🔋 Pragnapur → 🔋 Siddipet → 🔋 Dubbak → 🔋 Toopran → 🔋 Medak → 🔋 Mulugu → 🔋 Jagdevpur → 🔋 Wargal → 🔋 Nangnoor → 🔋 Chinnakodur → 🔋 Kondapak → 🔋 Markook → 🔋 Thoguta → 🔋 Papannapet → 🔋 Shankarampet (A) → 🔋 Shankarampet (R) → 🔋 Ahmedipur → 🔋 Akkaram → 🔋 Anantharaopally → 🔋 Bangla Venkatapur → 🔋 Bayyaram → 🔋 Bejgaon → 🔋 Burugupalle → 🔋 Kodakandla → 🔋 Komatibanda → 🔋 Kyasaram → 🔋 Mutrajpalle → 🔋 Singatam → 🔋 Kothaguda → 🔋 Raikal → 🔋 Velmal → 🔋 Konduru → 🔋 Mirzapur → 🔋 Regode → 🔋 Sangem → 🔋 Chinnakodur Rural → 🔋 Duddeda → 🔋 Siddipet Urban → 🔋 Siddipet Rural → 🔋 Yeshwantapur → 🔋 Komuravelli Temple → 🔋 Kallakal → 🔋 Kucharam → 🔋 Manoharabad → 🔋 Narsingi → 🔋 Podchenpalle → 🔋 Ramaipalle → 🔋 Wadiaram → 🔋 Islampur → 🔋 Hussainpur → 🔋 Kistapur → 🔋 Kondapur → 🔋 Allapur → 🔋 Brahmanapalle → 🔋 Ravelli → 🔋 Annaram → 🔋 Bacharam → 🔋 Cheekode → 🔋 Doulapur → 🔋 Namapur → 🔋 Narsampalle → 🔋 Pedda Shivnoor → 🔋 Valloor → 🔋 Chinna Shivnoor →
FAQ

Battery Delivery FAQs

Do you deliver batteries outside Gajwel?
Yes! We deliver to a 50+ km radius covering Siddipet, Medak, Sangareddy districts. Areas include Siddipet, Dubbak, Toopran, Wargal, Pragnapur, Markook, and 25+ villages. Call 9397617823.
How long does delivery usually take?
Gajwel & 10 km radius: 20–30 minutes. 10–25 km: 45–75 minutes. 25–50 km: 1.5–2 hours. We confirm exact time when you place the order.
Is there a delivery charge?
Delivery within 20 km of Gajwel is free. For 20–50 km, a minimal delivery charge applies — we always discuss this upfront before you confirm the order. No surprises.
Can you deliver in an emergency?
Yes! Emergency battery delivery is our speciality. Call 9397617823 any time 6 AM to 9 PM. If you are on the road or have a breakdown, tell us your exact location and we will come to you.
Do you install the battery at my location?
Yes, our delivery includes installation. Our technician carries the battery, tools, and voltmeter to test the new battery after installation — all in one visit.

Order Battery Delivery Now

Call or WhatsApp — tell us your location and vehicle. Delivered and installed same day.
